items.title: E3 • Down Low in Hell's Kitchen

data.headline: E3 • Down Low in Hell's Kitchen
data.text: A serial predator targeting men in gay bars proves difficult to catch, until a celebrity comes forward with his story.

items.title: E4 • The Burden of Our Choices

data.headline: E4 • The Burden of Our Choices
data.text: Rollins clashes with the parents of a teenaged runaway. The squad comes together for a special event.

data.headline: E5 • At Midnight in Manhattan
data.text: The detectives are spread thin when three major cases come in at midnight. Rollins and Carisi argue over an arrest.

data.text: The case of a teenage girl assaulted in the projects leads to a startling discovery. Benson puts her trust in someone…

data.headline: E7 • Counselor, It's Chinatown
data.text: The SVU joins an under cover task force in busting a human trafficking ring.

items.title: E8 • We Dream of Machine Elves

data.headline: E8 • We Dream of Machine Elves
data.text: Rollins goes undercover to find a suspect who is drugging and assaulting tourists, while Benson helps the victims sort…

data.headline: E9 • Can't Be Held Accountable
data.text: A fellow detective asks the SVU for help when he suspects his two daughters are being groomed by a serial predator. Kat…

data.headline: E10 • Must Be Held Accountable
data.text: A desperate father takes matters into his own hands in the case against his daughter's rapist.

data.headline: E11 • She Paints for Vengeance
data.text: After a sexual assault investigation is stalled for months, a woman puts her accusations against a popular athlete on a…

items.title: E12 • The Longest Night of Rain

data.headline: E12 • The Longest Night of Rain
data.text: Benson investigates a police officer's accusations of sexual assault. Captain Tucker's retirement party ends in tragedy.

data.headline: E13 • Redemption in Her Corner
data.text: Kat steps over the line when she suspects a trainer at her boxing gym is taking advantage of his students.

items.title: E14 • I Deserve Some Loving Too

data.headline: E14 • I Deserve Some Loving Too
data.text: Rollins goes undercover to root out a government worker withholding green cards in exchange for sex.

data.text: The female CEO of a popular wellness company says she was raped, but her business partner claims the accusation is part…

data.headline: E16 • Eternal Relief from Pain
data.text: Rollins' sister stirs up trouble and a possible SVU investigation when she reports a doctor who trades prescription…

data.headline: E17 • Dance, Lies and Videotape
data.text: An ingénue ballerina discovers she's been secretly videotaped for a pornographic website.

data.headline: E18 • Garland's Baptism by Fire
data.text: Chief Garland must put friendship aside when a pastor at his church is arrested.

data.text: The SVU struggles to find a serial predator who uses a date rape drug that leaves no evidence behind. Rollins receives…

items.title: E20 • The Things We Have to Lose

data.headline: E20 • The Things We Have to Lose
data.text: As Carisi begins the long-anticipated trial of Sir Toby Moore, the SVU faces setbacks in several other cases.
